description: Create a fully-constrained 2D kinematic skeleton of a slider-crank mechanism in SolveSpace. The crank must start at the origin (0,0) with a length of 25 mm and an angle of 45 degrees from the horizontal axis. The connecting rod must be 80 mm long, connecting the end of the crank to a point constrained to the horizontal axis (Y=0). Save the resulting sketch to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/slider_crank.slvs.
